texto: If an Arab in the desert were suddenly to discover a spring in his tent and so would always be able to have water in abundance how fortunate he would consider himself so too when a man who ... is always turned toward the outside thinking that his happiness lies outside him finally turns inward and discovers that the source is within him.
explicacao: Citação de Seren Kierkegaard sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “If an Arab in the desert were suddenly to discover a spring in his tent and so would always be ab…” articula reflexao, happiness, would em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
